Interface Clickable

All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseButton, CharacterButton, FavoriteButton, MapPopupButton, MapSelectionButton, NavigationButton, NavSettingButton, PetsButton, SettingsPopUpButton
public interface Clickable
Interface defining basic interactive behavior for UI components. Classes implementing this interface must provide logic for handling click events and mouse hover interactions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    handleClick()
    Handles the click event on the component.
    void
    onHoverEnter()
    Triggered when the mouse cursor enters the component area.
    void
    onHoverExit()
    Triggered when the mouse cursor leaves the component area.

  • Method Details

    • handleClick

      void handleClick()
      Handles the click event on the component.

    • onHoverEnter

      void onHoverEnter()
      Triggered when the mouse cursor enters the component area.

    • onHoverExit

      void onHoverExit()
      Triggered when the mouse cursor leaves the component area.
